# 355 Main — Sovereign Intelligence, Anchored in Armonk

> Three executive Sovereign Shells on the North Castle Ventures campus at 355 & 357 Main Street, Armonk, New York.

Full page-by-page content: https://355main.com/llms-full.txt

## What is 355 Main?

355 Main offers three executive **Sovereign Shells** — Class A commercial real estate fused with on-premises, deterministic AI and outfitted with Vitra furniture. Each shell is held for a single institution. The buildings sit on the North Castle Ventures campus in Armonk, NY (Westchester County), roughly 40 miles north of New York City.

## The Thesis

Regulated legal and financial institutions cannot send their most sensitive data to public model APIs. The answer is on-premises, deterministic AI co-located with the people who use it — compute, counsel, and capital in one room. 355 Main is built for that reality: sovereignty of space and sovereignty of compute, together.

Guiding principles:
- **Determinism over probability** — reliable, auditable systems for regulated work.
- **Premises over cloud** — data and models stay on-site.
- **Institution over crowd** — one institution per shell, not shared coworking.

Alpha School is the standing proof point — and in 2026 it leased the entire second floor of 355 Main (Floor 2, 5,800 USF / 7,590 RSF). The thesis is not a projection; it operates inside the building.

## The Shells

Three shells, one standard of sovereignty. Each pairs Class A space with on-premises compute and Vitra FF&E, held for a single institution.

- **Shell A** — Floor 1, Suite A. 814 USF / 1,065 RSF. Available.
- **Shell B** — Floor 1, Suite B. 888 USF / 1,162 RSF. Available.
- **Shell C** — Floor 1, Suite C. 810 USF / 1,060 RSF. Held by Trucast.ai — the physical model of the thesis, in occupancy.

The building is otherwise occupied: Northwell holds the Floor 1 back suite (2,440 USF / 3,193 RSF), and Alpha School leased the entire second floor (5,800 USF / 7,590 RSF) in 2026. Shells A and B are the last available ground in an occupied building.

## The Campus

355 & 357 Main Street, Armonk, NY — Class A buildings on the North Castle Ventures campus, outfitted with Vitra furniture for sovereign work. Coordinates: 41.1265° N, 73.7140° W. Manhattan proximity without the commute.

### FF&E Partners
- **Vitra** — premium furniture enabling dynamic reconfiguration.
- **BASO Lighting**, **Louis Poulsen**, **Coronet**, **Marset** — architectural and task lighting.
- **Casambi** — wireless lighting controls and scene management.

## Inquiry

Inquiries are a Request for Comment (RFC), reviewed personally by North Castle Ventures. Response within 1–2 business days.

## Ecosystem

- **North Castle Ventures** — https://northcastleventures.com
- **The RFC** — https://ainativeoffice.org
- **Nate** — https://nativeagentic.com
- **Trucast** — https://trucast.ai
